Perfect! I've completed the MU earnings data scraping task. Here's the summary:

## Results

**14 quality articles collected** for Micron Technology (MU) covering earnings previews, guidance, and market analysis.

### Articles Saved

1. **Q4 2024 Earnings Preview** (Sept 2024) - Expectations and analyst consensus
2. **$2,000 Price Prediction** (May 11, 2026) - Bull case analysis
3. **70% Rally Analysis** (May 2, 2026) - Why analysts see more upside
4. **Stock Dive Analysis** (May 15, 2026) - Market caution and geopolitical factors
5. **Q1 FY2026 Highlights** (Dec 18, 2025) - Record revenue and margins
6. **HBM Memory Boom Analysis** (May 11, 2026) - Cyclical risks and opportunities
7. **Q1 FY2026 Records & Q2 Outlook** (Dec 18, 2025) - Management guidance
8. **Q2 FY2026 Earnings Call** (March 18, 2026) - Record results and strategic agreements
9. **AI Memory Chip Harvard Warning** (May 11, 2026) - Cautionary perspective on cycles
10. **All-Time High Achievement** (May 15, 2026) - 690% annual surge
11. **Why Stock Keeps Going Up** (May 11, 2026) - 196% revenue growth driver
12. **Stock Breaks $800** (May 11, 2026) - Technical milestone and volatility
13. **HBM4 Production** (Tom's Hardware) - 2.3x bandwidth improvement for Nvidia
14. **HBM Memory Leader 2026 Plans** (Oct 25, 2025) - Customer expansion strategy

├── article_0001.json through article_0014.json

**Quality**: Articles span Q4 2024–May 2026, featuring authoritative sources (Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, Nasdaq, FX Leaders, Tom's Hardware, Bloomberg). Content includes earnings reports, analyst price targets ($249–$1,000), HBM supply constraints, and cautionary perspectives on memory cycles.

**Budget used**: $0.97/$1.00
